message: For sale: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, full RGB lighting. Excellent condition, tactile linear switches great for gaming and typing. Asking $75 — comparable Corsair boards retail well above this. Serious offers welcome.
Kitchen gadget alert! 🥤 I’m listing my lightly used Ninja 900W blender for $50 — great for smoothies, soups, and pretending you’re about to become a meal-prep legend.
Watching the channel — keyboard's up at $75. Still looking for a Bluetooth outdoor speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
Maya, I can offer $40 for the Ninja 900W blender. If it’s in good working condition, I can move quickly.
Still in the market for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (up to a fair price) and weekend dog-sitting. Keyboard available at $75.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones for $110. They have some wear but work well; happy to answer questions.
Keyboard still available at $75. Looking to buy: outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting — post if you've got either!
Howdy folks — listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $125. She’s scratched up some, but rides great and oughta give somebody a fair shake on the trails.
Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard still on offer at $75. Still seeking an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $28.
Keyboard still up at $75. Buyers for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker or weekend dog-sitting service — I'm ready to deal.

Hi Lin! I’m interested in the set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Could you share the titles and confirm they’re in good reading condition—no missing pages, major water damage, or heavy marking? If so, I’d be happy to offer $22 for the set.
Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard available at $75 — open to fair offers. Still in the market for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.

Hi Kai — the Corsair keyboard sounds lovely, especially with the red switches and RGB. My budget for a mechanical keyboard is $35, so I know that’s well below your ask, but I’d be happy to buy promptly at $35 if that works for you.

Thanks Zoe — glad you like it. $35 is well under what a Corsair RGB mechanical with red switches goes for; comparable used boards trade in the $65–90 range. I can come down from $75 to $68 for a prompt deal. That's a genuine discount on a board in excellent condition.
Listing my black JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof and working well, for $70. A fair deal should leave both sides feeling heard, and I’m open to reasonable offers.

Hi Rosa — interested in the JBL Flip 5, waterproof is exactly what I want for outdoor use. $70 is steep though; used Flip 5s typically trade in the $40–55 range, and battery life on these does degrade with age. Can you confirm the battery still holds a good charge and there's no port/charging issue? I can offer $32 for a quick, clean deal.
Hey Priya, those Sony XM3s are kinda what I’m looking for. Since they’ve got some wear, I could do $85 if they’re working solid.
Awaiting responses — Zoe on the keyboard at $68, Rosa on the JBL Flip 5. Still also looking for weekend dog-sitting.
Hey Derek! Smoothie machine is in good working condition and ready for its next fruit-adventure 🥤 I’m asking $50, but I can meet you at $45 for the Ninja blender.
Still open: keyboard to Zoe at $68, and my $32 offer on Rosa's JBL Flip 5 stands. Anyone offering weekend dog-sitting?
Maya, accepted at $45 for the Ninja 900W blender, assuming it’s in good working condition as stated.
Keyboard offer to Zoe stands at $68. Rosa — still keen on your JBL Flip 5 if the battery checks out. Open to weekend dog-sitting offers too.
Thanks, Jax. The Sony WH-1000XM3s are working well despite some wear. I can come down from $110 to $100 if that works for you.
Zoe, Rosa — my offers still stand. Keyboard at $68, and I'm a ready buyer for the JBL Flip 5. Still seeking weekend dog-sitting too.
Howdy folks — putting up my metal toolbox with basic hand tools included for $35. Solid starter kit for fixin’ odds and ends, and I reckon that’s a square deal.
Rosa, to move this along — I'll bump to $36 for the JBL Flip 5, cash-ready today. That's a fair price for a used Flip 5 with normal wear, and I'm a 4.7★ buyer who pays promptly. Deal?
Samir, good condition. I can do $25 for the set.
Standing offers: $68 keyboard to Zoe, $36 on Rosa's JBL Flip 5. Still keen on weekend dog-sitting.
Still holding my offers — $68 for the keyboard (Zoe), $36 for the JBL Flip 5 (Rosa). Ready to close quickly.

Listing my Japanese cast iron teapot with a blue enamel interior for $42. It has a lovely sturdy feel and makes tea feel like a small ritual — I’ve always enjoyed the deep blue inside when pouring. Happy to answer condition questions clearly.
My keyboard's still available at $68 to any serious buyer, and my $36 offer on the JBL Flip 5 stands. Still seeking weekend dog-sitting.
Kai, I appreciate the interest, but $32 is far below a fair exchange for a working waterproof JBL Flip 5. I can meet the market halfway at $60, which keeps the deal balanced for both of us.

Appreciate you moving, Rosa. But $60 is above what a used Flip 5 realistically trades for — they're well under $50 used, and the model's a few generations old now. My absolute top is $40, and I'll commit to that right now, paid promptly. That's a fair, market-rate close for both of us. Can't go higher.
Hey Priya, appreciate it — $100 is over my headphone budget though. I can stretch to $90 for the Sony XM3s if they’re working solid. That’s my max, but I’m down at that price.
Rosa — $40 offer stands on the JBL Flip 5, ready to pay now. Keyboard still available too. Anyone offering weekend dog-sitting?
Stretchy-deal time 🧘‍♀️ I’m listing my thick purple yoga mat with carrying strap for $25 — comfy, portable, and ready for its next downward dog adventure!
$40 firm offer to Rosa on the JBL Flip 5 still open. Keyboard available for the right buyer. Looking for weekend dog-sitting.
Listing a working Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera for $65. Firm on condition: working and ready to use.
Rosa, my $40 close on the JBL Flip 5 is still on the table — that's my firm top and I'll pay immediately. Let me know.
Thanks, Jax. I can accept $90 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. They’re working well as stated, with some cosmetic wear.
Rosa — still ready to close on the JBL Flip 5 at $40, paid immediately. That's my firm ceiling. Keyboard also still available to a serious buyer.
Rosa, the door's still open at $40 for the JBL Flip 5 — instant payment, clean deal. Can't exceed that. Keyboard remains available to any serious buyer.
Zoe, I can do $35 for the cast iron teapot.
Last call, Rosa — $40 cash for the JBL Flip 5, ready to settle this turn. That's my firm ceiling. Keyboard still on offer for any serious buyer too.
Thanks Lin — I’ll accept $25 for the set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks in good condition. Excited to read them!
Wrapping up. My $40 offer on the JBL Flip 5 stays open to the end, Rosa — but I won't exceed my ceiling. Keyboard still available at a fair price. Good trading, all.
Hi Lin — thank you for the $35 offer. This teapot has a wonderful sturdy feel and the blue enamel interior is in nice shape; I’d be happy to meet partway at $38 for it.
Market's closing. No deals reached on my end — held firm on both my floor ($50 keyboard) and ceiling ($40 speaker). Discipline over a bad deal. Thanks for the trading, everyone.
